_doc: Narration probe. Produce a short painterly sentence about a cozy scene as structured JSON. Tests that the model follows the painterly/cozy voice (WHIMSY.md) even in strict-JSON mode.
system: You write one short, cozy, painterly sentence of narration. Reply with JSON: {"text": "<one sentence>"}. No prose outside the JSON.
user: Scene: a wooden footbridge over a quiet creek at dusk.
